headline: Scientific-notation float literals (1e-05) were mis-handled in BOTH the Rust kernel's S-expr lexer AND fkwu's table flattener. Fixed both. The supposed 'Rust multi-head divergence' was never multi-head — it was the eps=1e-05 literal. transformer-mh / decoder / generate / whisper-mh-block-real + positional now cross FOUR-WAY.

root_cause.symptom: transformer-mh-band: go=1, rust=0, ts=1 (fails three-way); fkwu errors -5. Traced (bare-return value probes) through tb-mh-block → tb-ln-seq → tn-sqrt → its input. The input carried eps, baked by Python repr as `1e-05`.
root_cause.rust: main.rs SexpTok reader (and source_native_lex): the [eE][+-]?digits exponent was only consumed INSIDE the `.`-fraction branch, so `1e-05` (no decimal point) lexed `1` as an INT and `e-05` as a separate symbol → fatal[kernel_panic]: unbound: e-05. Go/TS readers already parse the bare-mantissa exponent.
root_cause.fkwu: form-flatten.fk flt-num2/flt-neg-num and the flt-scan-num2 pre-pass both only treated digits.digits as a float, stopping at a bare `e`. The parse path emitted a wrong literal AND the scan path never interned `1e-05` into the float pool → fkwu strtod read the wrong pool string → 0. (An earlier partial fix had only covered the after-the-dot exponent case.)

fix.rust: main.rs: both number arms (positive and `-`-prefixed) now set is_float and consume [eE][+-]?digits after the integer mantissa with or without a fractional part; a bare `e` not followed by a valid exponent stays a separate symbol.
fix.fkwu: form-flatten.fk: flt-float-end consumes a trailing exponent; new flt-has-exp/flt-exp-lit handle the no-decimal-point case in BOTH flt-num2/flt-neg-num (parse) and flt-scan-num2 (the float-pool pre-pass).

verified_four_way.full_suite: fourth arm 369 bands four-way; 0 divergent. The WHOLE whisper-tiny stack crosses (incl. mel-full).
verified_four_way.mel-full_resolved: mel-full was the SAME e-notation bug (its samples buffer carries e-15 values); its earlier fourth=0 was stale-cache noise + a lost `; preludes:` header (both fixed). Component probes (nth over the 560-element buffer, mfu-windowed, mfu-spectrogram, mfb-maxdiff) all cross four-way; with a fresh cache mel-full-band is four-way (maxdiff 1.8e-11). Registered.

methodology_lessons: The fourth arm compares the band's RETURN value — bands must end in a bare verdict, never (print x).
Read go/rust/ts/fkwu separately; clear .cache/fourth between exploratory runs.
Validate three-way via validate.sh, never bin-go alone.
A divergence shared across two kernels (here Rust + fkwu) can have ONE root cause (a literal format); fix the cause, not each symptom.
